title: oenothera laevigata var. scitula
intro: Oenothera laevigata var. scitula, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family, characterized by its fragrant, white to pink flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Oenothera laevigata var. scitula include its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid, which has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, including hot flashes and mood swings. Herbal preparations of Oenothera laevigata var. scitula include oil extracts, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
